kind: in-harness ablation POC (subagent executors + blind grader)
grader: fresh subagent, StructuredOutput, blind to arm
confound: control-arm executors had repo/skill Read + installed-plugin access and read the treatment; delta=0 does NOT mean the content is valueless
requirement: a valid run needs a HERMETIC executor: no repo/skill file access, no installed plugins; only the injected treatment text in the with arm
